name: mortalos
description: An experimental portable lifecycle protocol with deterministic lineage validation.

scripts.test: npm run verify:license && npm run verify:spec && npm run test:governance && npm run test:conformance && npm run test:properties && npm run test:lab && npm run build:lab && npm run verify:portable && npm run verify:singleton && npm run verify:h2
scripts.test:conformance: node --test test/bytes.test.mjs test/codec.test.mjs test/crypto.test.mjs test/schema-validation.test.mjs test/rejection-codes.test.mjs test/validator.test.mjs test/lineage.test.mjs test/mortality.test.mjs test/singleton.test.mjs test/process-determinism.test.mjs
scripts.test:coverage: MORTALOS_SKIP_FULL_SIGNATURE_BUDGET=1 node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include=src/bytes.mjs --test-coverage-include=src/codec.mjs --test-coverage-include=src/crypto.mjs --test-coverage-include=src/primordials.mjs --test-coverage-include=src/schema-validation.mjs --test-coverage-include=src/rejection-codes.mjs --test-coverage-include=src/validator.mjs --test-coverage-include=src/lineage.mjs --test-coverage-branches=90 test/bytes.test.mjs test/codec.test.mjs test/crypto.test.mjs test/schema-validation.test.mjs test/rejection-codes.test.mjs test/validator.test.mjs test/lineage.test.mjs test/mortality.test.mjs test/singleton.test.mjs
